The live action cuts to a white background featuring a blue camera shutter logo next to the text "SCI ACTIVE NETWORK" in blue and grey. Subsequently, a title card appears with the words "CHANGING TUBE AND TIRE" displayed in large, bold blue letters centered against the white background.

The scene shifts to a workshop where a man in a black polo shirt stands before a pegboard wall holding various tools. He reaches out with his right hand to grab a set of tire levers hanging on a rack, while a bright light shines in the background.

The man in the black polo shirt holds a yellow-handled tire lever in his right hand, lifting it away from the pegboard rack. He extends his left hand with an open palm beneath the tool, gesturing as if presenting the lever. The workshop background remains visible with various tools hanging on the wall.

The scene shifts to a wide shot of the man sitting on the floor, holding a bicycle wheel with a black tire. He manipulates the tire with his hands. Behind him, a red air compressor with a coiled yellow hose sits on the floor near a wooden wall frame. He wears grey pants.

The view cuts to an extreme close-up of a hand holding a small, silver, cylindrical metal component between the thumb and forefinger. The object features a knurled texture at its base. The background is dark and blurred, isolating the small part held in the foreground.

The extreme close-up shot continues, displaying a hand holding a small, silver, threaded metal component between the thumb and forefinger. The object features a knurled texture at its base. The background remains dark and blurred, isolating the small part held steadily in the foreground. The lighting reflects off the metallic surface.

The blue and grey "SCI ACTIVE NETWORK" logo appears on a white background. The scene cuts to a man in a black polo shirt sitting on the floor, holding a bicycle wheel with a black tire. He examines the rim while a white diagonal graphic overlay covers the left side of the frame.

The camera cuts to a close-up of the man's hands manipulating the black tire on the wheel rim. He wears a light blue wristband on his left wrist. His fingers press firmly against the tire edge, working to seat or adjust it against the metal rim structure.

The view cuts back to a medium shot of the man in a black polo shirt sitting on the floor. He holds a bicycle wheel upright, using both hands to manipulate the black tire along the rim. Wooden framing and white wall panels are visible in the background as he continues working on the wheel assembly.

The man in the black shirt uses two yellow-handled tire levers to pry the black tire bead over the metal rim edge. He holds one lever in place while using the other to lever the tire outward. The camera captures a medium shot of his upper body and hands working on the wheel.

The man in the black polo shirt continues using two yellow-handled tire levers to pry the black tire bead away from the metal rim. He grips the levers firmly, applying leverage to separate the tire from the wheel structure. The medium shot captures his upper body and hands working against the backdrop of wooden framing and white wall panels.

The man in the black shirt continues using two yellow-handled tire levers to pry the black tire bead away from the metal rim. He applies downward pressure on the lever handles, lifting the tire edge over the wheel structure while seated on the floor.

After the close-up sequence, a hand wearing a light blue wristband is seen touching the tire tread. The man in the black polo shirt then utilizes a yellow-handled tool to lever the tire bead away from the metal rim.
